a:r.a:t: Summary | Suggestion List for Trip Genie
Inability to understand basic user needs
Improve user intent and basic condition understanding (budget/headcount)
Enhance user profiling and cuntural understanding to generate rational itineraries
Remove the limitation to the rounds of interaction per day
Redirects any scenarios to "Customer Support" instead of live agent
Use keyword alerts for urgent cases to trigger quick resolutions
Lacks context-specific guidance and clear status info
AI detects changes, matches policies, shows status, and prioritizes self
Fails to handle combined requests of flight and hotel
Itineraries simply with a compilation of attractions
Generate itineraries with all travel-related elements
Rigid itinerary adjustment without highlights and detailed info
Allow flexible changes to generated itineraries.
Limited guidance after responses cause imprecise outputs
Use personified conversational tones and emotion
time alerts and give proactive guidance.
